overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, towering skyscrapers, and futuristic urban architecture. The footage appears to be from Cyberpunk 2077, with heavy rain, wet reflective surfaces, and atmospheric lighting from street lamps and holographic billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy cyberpunk intersection with mega tower

events.description: turns left at the intersection, moving away from the mega tower

agents.ego_description: walking through the rainy streets, observing the towering architecture and neon lights

entered.detail: tall futuristic skyscraper with illuminated windows dominating the skyline
tall street lamp casting warm orange light on the wet pavement
overhead power cables crisscrossing between buildings
modern commercial building with illuminated ground floor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a massive tower against the rainy night sky. The camera walks forward through the wet streets, illuminated by orange street lamps, then turns left at an intersection. The atmosphere is dense with rain and neon reflections on the asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with tram tracks and digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the street, passing by storefronts and tram tracks

notable_agents.action: person with umbrella crossing the street from right to left

entered.detail: metal tram tracks embedded in the wet asphalt road
large holographic billboard displaying advertisements on building facade
dark colored futuristic vehicle parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wider street with visible tram tracks, the scene features large digital billboards on the right and parked vehicles. A pedestrian with an umbrella crosses the street ahead. The rain continues to fall steadily, creating reflections on the wet road surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with industrial buildings and holographic advertisements

events.description: pedestrian in red jacket crosses the street from right to left

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street, approaching an overpass structure ahead

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket running across the street in the rain

entered.detail: concrete industrial structure with red graffiti tags on the wall
elevated highway or monorail track crossing over the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past large digital billboards and industrial buildings covered in graffiti. A pedestrian in a red jacket crosses the street. In the distance, a concrete overpass structure becomes visible as the camera approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered street under overpass with flying vehicle traffic

events.description: flying vehicle passes overhead in the distance between buildings

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass, observing the flying vehicle and neon-lit buildings ahead

notable_agents.action: person holding umbrella standing on the street corner waiting

entered.detail: massive concrete pillars and elevated roadway creating a covered area
futuristic aerial vehicle with lights flying between skyscrapers
bright yellow commercial building with multiple neon signs and advertisements
tall palm tree visible near the yellow building

segments.scene_description: Moving under the concrete overpass, the lighting becomes darker and more mixed. A flying vehicle passes overhead between the buildings. Ahead, a bright yellow building with vivid neon signs becomes prominent, marking a transition to a more commercial zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with bright neon storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking past the yellow commercial building, observing the neon signs and storefronts

entered.detail: red neon sign for El Coyote Cojo bar on the building facade
row of illuminated vending machines on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The final segment features the camera passing the bright yellow building with intense neon signage, including the El Coyote Cojo bar. Vending machines line the sidewalk. The rain continues to create a cyberpunk atmosphere with reflections on the wet concrete as the journey continues down the neon-lit street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-slicked cyberpunk district that evolves from a towering industrial skyline into a vibrant, neon-drenched commercial zone. It begins by moving toward a massive tower under a dark rainy sky, navigating wet intersections illuminated by orange street lamps before turning onto a wider road marked by tram tracks and glowing digital billboards. As the camera advances past graffiti-covered industrial buildings and crossing pedestrians, the open street gradually narrows toward a looming concrete overpass. The scene then shifts into the shadows beneath the overpass, where a flying vehicle passes overhead just as the lighting transitions from dim gray to the vivid glow of a bright yellow building. Finally, the camera passes the intense neon signage of the El Coyote Cojo bar and sidewalk vending machines, continuing down a street saturated with colorful reflections on the wet concrete.
